zh.lifeSummary: 當John Napier 3rd of Merchiston於1419年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓時，他的父親Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh5歲，母親Elizabeth Lauder25歲。他和Elizabeth Menteith至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1488年6月11日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Napier 3rd of Merchiston was born in 1419, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, was 5 and his mother, Elizabeth Lauder, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Menteith. He died on 11 June 1488, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Napier 3rd of Merchiston est né en 1419, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lauder, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Menteith. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1488, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Napier 3rd of Merchiston 1419 in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh 5 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lauder 25. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Menteith mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juni 1488 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Napier 3rd of Merchiston è nato il nel 1419 nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, aveva 5 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lauder, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Menteith. Morì il 11 giugno 1488, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Napier 3rd of Merchistonが1419年にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで生まれた時，父Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburghは5歳，母Elizabeth Lauderは25歳であった。彼はElizabeth Menteithとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1488年6月11日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Napier 3rd of Merchiston(이)가 1419년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh(은)는 5세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lauder(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Menteith(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 6월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Napier 3rd of Merchiston nasceu em 1419, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lauder, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Menteith. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1488, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Napier 3rd of Merchiston родился в 1419 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lauder, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Menteith. Он умер 11 июня 1488 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Napier 3rd of Merchiston nació en 1419, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lauder, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Elizabeth Menteith. Murió el 11 de junio de 1488, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
